# utils { #forensicface.utils }

`utils`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [aggregate_embeddings](#forensicface.utils.aggregate_embeddings) | Aggregates multiple embeddings into a single embedding. |
| [annotate_img_with_kps](#forensicface.utils.annotate_img_with_kps) | Annotate an image with keypoints. |
| [compute_ss_ds](#forensicface.utils.compute_ss_ds) | Compute cosine similarities between the cartesian product of two arrays X and Z and |
| [cosine_score](#forensicface.utils.cosine_score) | Compute cosine similarity between two 1D embeddings. |
| [transform_keypoints](#forensicface.utils.transform_keypoints) | Transforms keypoints from the original image space to the aligned image space. |

### aggregate_embeddings { #forensicface.utils.aggregate_embeddings }

```python
utils.aggregate_embeddings(embeddings, weights=None, method='mean')
```

Aggregates multiple embeddings into a single embedding.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**embeddings**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   A 2D array of shape (num_embeddings, embedding_dim) containing the embeddings to be aggregated.

<code>[**weights**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray \| None]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   A 1D array of shape (num_embeddings,) containing the weights to assign to each embedding. If not provided, all embeddings are equally weighted.

<code>[**method**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [str]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [\'mean\']{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Aggregation method. Possible values are ``"mean"`` and ``"median"``.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   np.ndarray: A 1D array of shape (embedding_dim,) containing the

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   aggregated embedding.

### annotate_img_with_kps { #forensicface.utils.annotate_img_with_kps }

```python
utils.annotate_img_with_kps(bgr_img, kps, color='red', radius=2)
```

Annotate an image with keypoints.

Parameters:
bgr_img (numpy.ndarray): The input image in BGR format.
kps (numpy.ndarray): A numpy array of shape (5, 2) containing the keypoints.
color (str, optional): The color of the keypoints. Default is 'red'.
                    Options are 'red', 'blue', 'green', 'white', 'black'.
radius (int, optional): The radius of the keypoints. Default is 2.

Returns:
numpy.ndarray: The image with keypoints annotated.

### compute_ss_ds { #forensicface.utils.compute_ss_ds }

```python
utils.compute_ss_ds(X, x_id, x_names=None, Z=None, z_id=None, z_names=None)
```

Compute cosine similarities between the cartesian product of two arrays X and Z and
return same-source (ss) and different-source (ds) scores.
If only the array X and x_id are provided, compute the cosine similarities between all pairwise
combination in X. Also return the names of the files associated with each score, is x_names and z_names are provided.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**X**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   2D numpy array with one embedding per row.

<code>[**x_id**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   1D numpy array with identity labels for ``X``.

<code>[**x_names**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray \| None]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Optional 1D numpy array with names of files associated with the embeddings in ``X``.

<code>[**Z**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray \| None]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Optional 2D numpy array with one embedding per row.

<code>[**z_id**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray \| None]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Optional 1D numpy array with identity labels for ``Z``.

<code>[**z_names**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray \| None]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Optional 1D numpy array with names of files associated with the embeddings in ``Z``.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, list[tuple] \| None]: Scores, same-source

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   and different-source labels, and optional file-name pairs.

### cosine_score { #forensicface.utils.cosine_score }

```python
utils.cosine_score(x, z)
```

Compute cosine similarity between two 1D embeddings.

### transform_keypoints { #forensicface.utils.transform_keypoints }

```python
utils.transform_keypoints(keypoints, M)
```

Transforms keypoints from the original image space to the aligned image space.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**keypoints**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   A 2D array of shape (5, 2) representing the original keypoints.

<code>[**M**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The 2x3 affine transformation matrix.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [np.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   np.ndarray: A 2D array of shape (5, 2) representing the transformed keypoints.
